Feature request: let users bulk-download a whole folder as a single zip. Several customers have asked for this capability.
Feature request: add a dark mode toggle to the settings page. Several customers have asked for this capability.

Feature request: allow scheduling a report to be emailed weekly. Several customers have asked for this capability.
Feature request: add keyboard shortcuts for the most common actions. Several customers have asked for this capability.
